summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Kashi Wellness Ayurvedic D2C site completed on the preview URL (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). All 17 section data-testids render on the home page. Cart flows (open via icon, add via hero/featured/comparison/combo-offer CTAs, increment/decrement, remove, subtotal recompute, empty-state) all work. Ingredient tabs (0-3), FAQ accordion, newsletter form (success on valid email, error on empty), legal pages /privacy /terms /refund /shipping render with correct data-testids and H1s. Mobile menu toggle opens nav at 390px with zero horizontal overflow. No JS page errors. Only minor a11y warnings.

issues: React warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent}. Add SheetDescription or aria-describedby to SheetContent for a11y compliance (non-blocking warning only).

Email validation regex `/\S+@\S+\.\S+/` plus HTML5 type=email accepts edge inputs like 'bademail@@x' as valid. Functional (empty rejected, well-formed accepted) but consider a stricter regex if strict validation is desired. Not blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Add SheetDescription / aria-describedby to CartDrawer SheetContent to silence Radix a11y warning.
(Optional) Tighten newsletter email regex if strict format enforcement is desired.
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext: clean, useCallback-wrapped, subtotal/count derived correctly. Good.

CartDrawer: actual testids are `cart-qty-increment-{id}` / `cart-qty-decrement-{id}` (slightly different from the spec text 'cart-qty-inc/dec'). Verified working; no action needed unless spec wording is strict.
Files generally under 200 lines, well-modularised. No hardcoded URLs; uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL convention (no backend calls in this project).
No console errors during full E2E run; only Radix a11y warnings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart drawer quantity buttons use testids `cart-qty-increment-{id}` and `cart-qty-decrement-{id}` (NOT inc/dec). All 17 section testids verified on home. Legal pages exposed at /privacy /terms /refund /shipping with testid `legal-page-{slug}`. Newsletter input has type=email so 'notanemail' triggers HTML5 native validation (no toast fires) — to exercise the custom error toast, submit with empty value (verified working). Mobile menu toggles `mobile-menu` at 390px viewport. No backend, no auth.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical issues found. Only two minor non-blocking observations: (1) Radix Sheet/Dialog a11y warning — fix by adding <SheetDescription> or aria-describedby; (2) Email regex is permissive — tighten if strict validation needed.
